chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-126 of 2026. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 18.02.2026. Ms. Assia Rajput, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State alongwith Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP, Hyderabad, ASI Sajjad Ali on behalf of SHO PS Pinyari and ASI Umed Ali from PS Tando Adam City. ***************************************** Mr. Ashraf Ali Panhwar, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No.8 (Iftikhar), which is taken on record. Learned counsel for Respondent submits that neither the Petitioner was illegally harassed by the Respondents nor they would do so in future. Learned A.A.G. Sindh files statements / comments on behalf of official respondents which are taken on record. He further submits that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner and the police officials shall act strictly in accordance with law. Accordingly, instant Petition is disposed of along with listed application(s), if any, with direction to the police officials to act strictly in accordance with law and provide legal protection to the petitioner within four corners of law. However, this order would not affect the legal proceedings already pending between the parties or subsequently initiated by either side. Let a copy of this order be communicated to officials respondents for compliance. JUDGE Ali.
